OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-08-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Complete Discovery Proceedings And To Compel, Deposition Of Plaintiffs Expert, Responses To Korn Ferrys Supplemental Interrogatories And Supplemental Request For Production And Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Production, Set Two
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KORN FERRY (US), FORMERLY KNOWN AS KORN FERRY HAY's Motion To Complete Discovery Proceedings And To Compel, Deposition Of Plaintiffs Expert, Responses To Korn Ferrys Supplemental Interrogatories And Supplemental Request For Production And Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Production, Set Two is DENIED as follows. KF's Motion to Compel Deposition of Plaintiff's Expert is denied as moot, the deposition took place on March 1, 2021. However, the Court finds that KF was required to file this Motion in order to take that deposition. See Mtn. MPA 3:12-28. KF's Motion to Complete Discovery Proceedings beyond the deadline and Motion to Compel Responses to Supplemental and other written discovery is DENIED as untimely. All requests for sanctions are denied.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
